_comment: Echo Realm — Global Challenge Item Store. Paste the 'earned' array value into localStorage key 'er-challenge-items-v1' to unlock all challenge items for new character creation. These are slot-independent and survive Legacy (slot deletion).

allChallengeItems.name: Wisp Lantern
allChallengeItems.desc: A sealed lantern holding a captured Shade Wisp. Glows faintly. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Hollow Draught
allChallengeItems.desc: Brewed from a Hollow's last breath. Restores 15 HP and clears confusion. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Resonance Fork
allChallengeItems.desc: A blade tuned to the frequency of memory itself. Hums near void. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Echo Tonic
allChallengeItems.desc: Restores 22 HP. The resonance hum lingers on the tongue. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Keeper's Sigil
allChallengeItems.desc: A sigil worn only by those who survived the arena rites. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Archive Blade
allChallengeItems.desc: A page from the Archive, rolled tight and edged in void-steel. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Void Shard Edge
allChallengeItems.desc: Cut from a concentrated void shard. Forgets to stop cutting. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Echo Bulwark
allChallengeItems.desc: Forged from solidified resonance. Blocks 10 flat damage per hit. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Nexus Crown
allChallengeItems.desc: The crown of whatever ruled the Nexus before the silence. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Oblivion Fang
allChallengeItems.desc: A blade that forgets what it cuts through. The cut remains. Challenge-exclusive.

allChallengeItems.name: Creed Emblem
allChallengeItems.desc: A trinket pulsing with the full spectrum of the Chromatic path. Its power grows with each chroma skill you carry into battle. Challenge-exclusive — Chromatic tier.
allChallengeItems.note: Scales with chroma skill count during battle

allChallengeItems.name: Chromatic Tide
allChallengeItems.desc: Enchants a weapon. +8 ATK. On a solid hit: confuses, freezes, and weakens the enemy by 2. A spectrum of suffering. Challenge-exclusive — Chromatic tier.

allChallengeItems.name: Mortus' Verdict
allChallengeItems.desc: Enchants a weapon. +15 ATK. On a solid hit: drains 8 HP from the enemy and silences it. The last word written in any age. Challenge-exclusive — Mortus tier.

allChallengeItems.name: Throne Blade of Mortus
allChallengeItems.desc: The blade that ended the first age. Still hungry. Challenge-exclusive — Mortus tier.
allChallengeItems.note: Legacy lore item — defined in constants for completeness

allChallengeItems.name: Void Mantle of Mortus
allChallengeItems.desc: The armor of the Void's own herald. Refuses every ending. Challenge-exclusive — Mortus tier.
allChallengeItems.note: Legacy lore item — defined in constants for completeness

allChallengeItems.name: Eye of Mortus
allChallengeItems.desc: Preserved from the final witness of the old world. Watches for you. Challenge-exclusive — Mortus tier.
allChallengeItems.note: Legacy lore item — defined in constants for completeness
